items.headline: RBI maintains repo rate at 5.25%, projects FY27 CPI inflation at 4.6%
items.summary: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) kept the repo rate unchanged at 5.25% with a neutral stance. CPI inflation for FY27 is projected at 4.6%, revised from an earlier 5.1%. Real GDP growth for FY27 is projected at 6.9%.

items.headline: India becomes 11th biggest FDI recipient in 2025, inflows up 44% to $39 billion
items.summary: India climbed two spots to become the 11th largest recipient of foreign direct investment in 2025, with inflows increasing by 44% to $39 billion.

items.headline: Government plans to establish Cooperative Life Insurance Company
items.summary: The Indian government is planning to establish a Cooperative Life Insurance Company as part of its efforts to expand the cooperative sector.

items.headline: Global markets cautious as US-Iran tensions escalate, crude oil surges above $75
items.summary: Global markets are trading cautiously due to renewed US-Iran tensions, including the US revoking Iran's authorization to sell oil and reports of fresh strikes in West Asia, leading to crude oil prices surging above $75 a barrel.

items.headline: Indian benchmarks end four-day winning streak on July 7; FIIs net buyers
items.summary: Indian equity benchmarks ended a four-day winning streak on July 7th, with Nifty 50 and BSE Sensex falling 0.13%. Foreign institutional investors (FIIs) were net buyers of shares worth Rs 393.19 crore, while DIIs were net sellers.

items.headline: Tata Consultancy Services to report Q1FY27 results on Thursday
items.summary: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) is scheduled to report its June-quarter results on Thursday, marking the commencement of the Q1FY27 earnings season.

items.headline: Motilal Oswal projects 10% Nifty earnings growth for Q1FY27, fastest in four quarters
items.summary: Motilal Oswal anticipates Nifty earnings to grow by 10% in Q1FY27, indicating the fastest pace in four quarters.

items.headline: HCL Technologies shares rise ahead of quarterly earnings
items.summary: HCL Technologies stock rose 3.08% ahead of its upcoming quarterly earnings announcement.

items.headline: Titan Company revenue up 41% YoY in June quarter on strong jewellery, watches, eyewear
items.summary: Titan Company climbed 2.62% after reporting a 41% year-on-year increase in June-quarter revenue, driven by strong performance in its jewellery, watches, and eyewear businesses.

items.headline: Trent plunges 12.4% on softer-than-expected Q2 standalone revenue growth
items.summary: Trent's stock plunged 12.4% following its report of softer-than-expected standalone revenue growth for the June quarter.

items.headline: M&M Finance Q1 disbursements surge 21% YoY to ₹15,560 crore
items.summary: M&M Finance reported a 21% year-on-year surge in Q1 disbursements, reaching ₹15,560 crore.

items.headline: Raymond Realty Q4 pre-sales jump 129% to ₹700 crore
items.summary: Raymond Realty saw its Q4 pre-sales jump 129% to ₹700 crore.

items.headline: IT index rises 2.4% but Q1FY27 faces 'AI shock' and weak discretionary spending
items.summary: The IT index saw a 2.4% rise on July 7th. However, the Q1FY27 outlook for the IT sector is challenging due to the 'AI shock' and weak discretionary spending, potentially leading to lower guidance from companies.

items.headline: Power, Capital Goods, Telecom, Healthcare, and Metals sectors show positive growth
items.summary: Sectors like Power, Capital Goods, Telecom, Healthcare, and Metals have recently demonstrated positive growth.

items.headline: IT, Oil & Gas, FMCG, Auto, and Financials sectors experience declines
items.summary: Conversely, IT, Oil & Gas, FMCG, Auto, and Financials sectors have recently experienced declines.

items.headline: Oil-sensitive stocks in focus today due to crude price surge
items.summary: Oil-sensitive stocks, including upstream oil producers, oil marketing companies (OMCs), aviation, paint, and tyre companies, are expected to be in focus due to the surge in crude oil prices.

items.headline: Real estate sector attracts $2.9 billion in foreign inflows in Q2 2026
items.summary: The real estate sector is showing strong investor confidence, attracting $2.9 billion in foreign inflows during Q2 2026.

items.headline: Renewable energy and auto sectors adopting distinct EV strategies
items.summary: The renewable energy and automobile sectors are seeing major companies adopting distinct electric vehicle strategies.

items.headline: India's deal value doubles to $36.3 billion in Q2 2026, highest M&A since Q2 2022
items.summary: India's deal value more than doubled in Q2 2026, reaching $36.3 billion, primarily driven by large overseas acquisitions. M&A activity accounted for $27.9 billion, marking the highest quarterly figure since Q2 2022.

items.headline: United Spirits declares ₹11 per share dividend
items.summary: United Spirits announced a dividend of ₹11 per share for today, July 8, 2026.

items.headline: MphasiS declares ₹62 per share dividend
items.summary: MphasiS announced a dividend of ₹62 per share for today, July 8, 2026.

items.headline: ideaForge Technology opens QIP issue at floor price of ₹835.86 per share
items.summary: ideaForge Technology opened its Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) issue on July 7, 2026, with a floor price of ₹835.86 per share.

items.headline: Panacea Biotec files appeals with High Court on industrial tribunal awards
items.summary: Panacea Biotec has filed appeals with the Punjab & Haryana High Court concerning industrial tribunal awards related to worker transfers, wage revision, and reinstatement.

items.headline: RCF plans to raise up to ₹1,500 crore through FPO
items.summary: State-owned fertilizer firm RCF announced plans to raise up to ₹1,500 crore through a follow-on public offer (FPO).

items.headline: Oil-sensitive stocks to be volatile amidst surging crude prices
items.summary: Stocks like ONGC, OIL, InterGlobe Aviation (IndiGo), and Asian Paints are expected to be volatile due to the sharp rise in crude oil prices.

items.headline: RCF in focus after announcing plans for ₹1,500 crore FPO
items.summary: Rashtriya Chemicals and Fertilizers (RCF) is in focus following its announcement of a follow-on public offer (FPO) to raise up to ₹1,500 crore.

items.headline: ideaForge Technology draws attention with ongoing QIP issue
items.summary: ideaForge Technology is notable due to its ongoing Qualified Institutional Placement (QIP) issue, which opened on July 7, 2026.

items.headline: Panacea Biotec in news over High Court appeals regarding tribunal awards
items.summary: Panacea Biotec is in the news regarding its legal appeals filed with the Punjab & Haryana High Court concerning industrial tribunal awards.

items.headline: Embassy Developments reports strong Q1FY27 pre-sales and collections
items.summary: Embassy Developments has reported strong pre-sales and collections for Q1FY27.

items.headline: Adani Enterprises, Cochin Shipyard, IDFC First Bank, Glenmark Pharma identified as 'stocks in news'
items.summary: Adani Enterprises, Cochin Shipyard, IDFC First Bank, and Glenmark Pharma have been identified as 'stocks in news' today.
